record.field:
import logging
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
Remote = self.remote_id today_str = fields.Date.today() values = env['ir.values'].sudo()
logger.info("[SCADA SQL] Starting Build Plan action")
sql_server = values.get_default('wua.irrigation.configuration', 'sql_server_scada') or '' sql_port = values.get_default('wua.irrigation.configuration', 'sql_port_scada') or '1433' sql_database = values.get_default('wua.irrigation.configuration', 'sql_database_scada') or '' sql_uid = values.get_default('wua.irrigation.configuration', 'sql_uid_scada') or '' sql_pwd = values.get_default('wua.irrigation.configuration', 'sql_pwd_scada') or ''
connection_params = { 'server': sql_server, 'port': sql_port, 'database': sql_database, 'uid': sql_uid, 'pwd': sql_pwd, } bag['connection_params'] = connection_params
logger.info( "[SCADA SQL] Build Plan connection params server=%s port=%s database=%s user=%s password_set=%s" % (sql_server, sql_port, sql_database, sql_uid, bool(sql_pwd)) )
condition = [ ('telecontrol_associated', '=', 'scada'), ('scada_intake', '!=', False), ] waterconnections = env['wua.waterconnection'].search(condition)
logger.info( "[SCADA SQL] Build Plan found %d candidate waterconnections" % len(waterconnections) )
plan = [] for waterconnection in waterconnections: intake = (waterconnection.scada_intake or '').strip() if not intake: logger.warning( "[SCADA SQL] Build Plan skipped waterconnection %s without intake" % waterconnection.id ) continue last_m = False if waterconnection.watermeter_id: last_m = waterconnection.watermeter_id.last_reading_time if last_m: try: initial_date = fields.Date.to_string( fields.Datetime.from_string(last_m) ) except Exception: initial_date = str(last_m)[:10] else: year_str = today_str[:4] initial_date = '%s-01-01' % year_str plan.append({ 'sensor_id': waterconnection.id, 'device_id': waterconnection.id, 'waterconnection_id': waterconnection.id, 'intake': intake, 'initial_date': initial_date, })
bag['sensors_plan'] = plan bag['plan_count'] = len(plan)
logger.info("[SCADA SQL] Build Plan generated %d items" % len(plan)) Remote.message_post(body='[SCADA SQL] Build Plan: %s items' % len(plan))
SCADA SQL: Fetch and Parse Rows

import mysql.connector import logging
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
Remote = self.remote_id plan = bag.get('sensors_plan') or []
rows = [] errors = [] selected_driver = 'mysql.connector'
try: logger.info("[SCADA SQL] Starting Fetch and Parse Rows action") logger.info("[SCADA SQL] Plan contains %d sensors" % len(plan))
values = env['ir.values'].sudo() server = values.get_default( 'wua.irrigation.configuration', 'sql_server_scada') or '' port_val = values.get_default( 'wua.irrigation.configuration', 'sql_port_scada') or '3306' database = values.get_default( 'wua.irrigation.configuration', 'sql_database_scada') or '' uid_raw = values.get_default( 'wua.irrigation.configuration', 'sql_uid_scada') or '' pwd_raw = values.get_default( 'wua.irrigation.configuration', 'sql_pwd_scada') or ''
if isinstance(port_val, basestring): port_val = port_val.strip() try: port = int(port_val) except Exception: port = 3306
server = server.strip() if isinstance(server, basestring) else str(server).strip() database = database.strip() if isinstance(database, basestring) else str(database).strip() uid = uid_raw.strip() if isinstance(uid_raw, basestring) else str(uid_raw).strip() pwd = pwd_raw.strip() if isinstance(pwd_raw, basestring) else str(pwd_raw).strip()
bag['connection_params'] = { 'server': server, 'port': str(port), 'database': database, 'uid': uid, 'pwd': pwd, }
if not all([server, database, uid]): logger.error("[SCADA SQL] Missing required connection parameters") raise Exception('Missing required connection parameters')
if pwd in (None, ''): logger.error("[SCADA SQL] Missing password in connection_params") raise Exception('Missing password parameter (pwd/password/pass)')
logger.info( "[SCADA SQL] Connecting to %s:%d/%s as %s (password_set=%s)" % (server, port, database, uid, bool(pwd)) )
config = { 'host': server, 'port': port, 'user': uid, 'password': pwd, 'database': database, }
conn = mysql.connector.connect(**config) logger.info("[SCADA SQL] Connected successfully") cursor = conn.cursor()
for item in plan: sensor_id = item['sensor_id'] device_id = item['device_id'] intake = (item['intake'] or '').strip() initial_date = item['initial_date'] waterconnection_id = item.get('waterconnection_id')
query = ( 'SELECT fecha, toma, contador, caudal ' 'FROM odoo ' 'WHERE TRIM(toma) = %s ' 'AND fecha >= %s ' 'ORDER BY fecha ASC' ) fallback_query = ( 'SELECT fecha, toma, contador, caudal ' 'FROM odoo ' 'WHERE TRIM(toma) = %s ' 'ORDER BY fecha ASC ' 'LIMIT 3' )
try: logger.info( "[SCADA SQL] Fetching sensor %d with intake=%s from %s" % (sensor_id, intake, initial_date) ) cursor.execute(query, (intake, initial_date)) results = cursor.fetchall() if not results: logger.warning( "[SCADA SQL] No rows with date filter for sensor %d. Trying fallback without date filter" % sensor_id ) cursor.execute(fallback_query, (intake,)) results = cursor.fetchall() logger.info("[SCADA SQL] Got %d rows for sensor %d" % (len(results), sensor_id))
for row in results: timestamp = row[0] if hasattr(timestamp, 'strftime'): timestamp = timestamp.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') else: timestamp = str(timestamp) rows.append({ 'sensor_id': sensor_id, 'device_id': device_id, 'waterconnection_id': waterconnection_id, 'intake': intake, 'timestamp': timestamp, 'contador': row[2], 'value': row[3], 'caudal': row[3], }) except Exception as exc: error_msg = str(exc) logger.error("[SCADA SQL] Error fetching data for sensor %d: %s" % (sensor_id, error_msg)) errors.append({ 'sensor_id': sensor_id, 'device_id': device_id, 'intake': intake, 'query': query, 'fallback_query': fallback_query, 'error': error_msg, })
cursor.close() conn.close() logger.info("[SCADA SQL] Cursor and connection closed") except Exception as ex: error_msg = str(ex) logger.exception("[SCADA SQL] Fatal error in Fetch action: %s" % error_msg) errors.append({'fatal_error': error_msg})
bag['scada_sql_rows'] = rows bag['scada_sql_fetch_errors'] = errors bag['scada_sql_driver'] = selected_driver
logger.info("[SCADA SQL] Fetch completed: %d rows, %d errors (driver=%s)" % (len(rows), len(errors), selected_driver))
Remote.message_post( body='[SCADA SQL] Fetch: %s rows, %s errors (driver=%s)' % (len(rows), len(errors), selected_driver) )
